---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: bobiknaj1229
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Simulate '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages from the browser console (F12 → Console tab).

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Environment affected:** PROD / UAT / DEV
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 125, Safari 17, Firefox 126)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17)
- **Device:** Desktop / Mobile / Tablet

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem — e.g. does it happen every time or only after simulating certain teams?
